title: Semantic Intent Contract (SIC)
description: Approved SIC body, fingerprinted, gating DTC proposal. Independently versioned from DTC per ADR-004 (a gap-report format change does not force a build-session format bump). Runtime-neutral. Real content P330.

fdeSessionId.description: Pointer to the originating fde-session.contract.json aggregate.

status.description: Matches P230's confirmed legacy status union, carried forward (outputs/p230-state-migration-census.md section 3.1).

bodyFingerprint.description: sha256 content hash of the exact approved SIC body — a canonical fingerprint, not a mutable pointer to "the current SIC" (ADR-004).

reasonCode.description: Stable code from contracts/reason-code-registry.json explaining an approval or a superseded/denied disposition.
